ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the monitoring station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the monitoring station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "sensor_types" TEXT /* List of sensor types installed at the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's contact phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station related to the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "data_accessed" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environmental data entry it assesses */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality assessment */,
  "quality_rating" REAL /* Quality rating (scale from 1 to 10) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the assessment */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality assessment */,
  "quality_reason" TEXT /* Detailed reasons for the quality rating */,
  "revised_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the revised data entry if the original data was corrected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station linked to the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high humidity, low radiation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the metric entry */,
  "uptime_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of time the station was operational */,
  "maintenance_needed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if maintenance is required */,
  "data_reliability" REAL /* Reliability of data collected by the station */,
  "last_data_collection_date" TEXT /* Last date data was successfully collected */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_metrics_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)
